parameters.prompt: One photorealistic hard-surface cockpit pressure-frame segment for a large expedition spacecraft, 6.4 m outer width, 3.2 m outer height, 0.55 m deep, with a 5.7 m by 2.55 m clear faceted opening. Layered load-bearing titanium ring, pressure seals, bolted splice plates, cable and ventilation channels, light recesses, inspection covers and realistic bevels. Symmetric, watertight solid architecture, isolated single object, front faces +Z. No wall fill, window, door, floor, console, seat, loose cables, text, logo, stand, ground, or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit realistic spacecraft pressure structure: brushed titanium load members, dark elastomer seals, graphite composite cable covers, subtle machining and maintenance wear, restrained amber service accents, no baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, dirt wash, or emissive glow.

reasons: geometry is a circular pressure collar rather than the required wide faceted cockpit frame
clear aperture and outer aspect do not match the 6.4 x 3.2 m cockpit envelope
